description: Deep Memory capture hooks for Claude Code (fail-open env-bootstrap, non-blocking).

hooks.command: node -e "const{spawn}=require('node:child_process');const{existsSync}=require('node:fs');const{join}=require('node:path');const r=process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT||process.env.PLUGIN_ROOT||'';if(r===''){console.error('deep-memory session-start hook: plugin root env unset; capture skipped');process.exit(0)}const s=join(r,'scripts','hooks','session-start.mjs');if(existsSync(s)===false){console.error('deep-memory hook: missing '+s+'; capture skipped');process.exit(0)}const c=spawn(process.execPath,[s],{stdio:'inherit'});c.on('error',(e)=>{console.error('deep-memory hook: spawn error '+e.message+'; capture skipped');process.exit(0)});c.on('exit',(code)=>{process.exit(typeof code==='number'?code:0)})"

node -e "const{spawn}=require('node:child_process');const{existsSync}=require('node:fs');const{join}=require('node:path');const r=process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT||process.env.PLUGIN_ROOT||'';if(r===''){console.error('deep-memory user-prompt-submit hook: plugin root env unset; capture skipped');process.exit(0)}const s=join(r,'scripts','hooks','user-prompt-submit.mjs');if(existsSync(s)===false){console.error('deep-memory hook: missing '+s+'; capture skipped');process.exit(0)}const c=spawn(process.execPath,[s],{stdio:'inherit'});c.on('error',(e)=>{console.error('deep-memory hook: spawn error '+e.message+'; capture skipped');process.exit(0)});c.on('exit',(code)=>{process.exit(typeof code==='number'?code:0)})"
